decision.summary: Keep both live positions unchanged and do not open any new BTC position this cycle.
decision.rationale: The live weekly 74k Apr 6-12 Yes and daily 70k Apr 12 Yes positions are both well below the 90-95% take-profit zone, and the playbook disables stop-loss in the current early-stage portfolio, so neither should be closed or reduced. The latest 2026-04-12 transcript and recent summaries keep Beecthor’s active thesis bearish, expecting further downside unless recent highs are reclaimed, and Binance confirms that execution reality with BTC at 71006.59, down 2.706% on the day and near session lows. But the daily slot is already filled with the nearest valid bearish line, and the remaining weekly bearish alternatives are still too discounted to offer a clean new edge.
